[[Princess/Legends|Princess]] '''Tsian''' was a [[Galactic Senate/Legends|Senate]] lobbyist from [[Old Mankoo]] who arrived on [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]] in [[23 BBY/Legends|23 BBY]]. In reality, she was an [[Assassin/Legends|assassin]] who was trying to kill [[Simon Greyshade/Legends|Simon Greyshade]], just as she had done to many other notable politicians throughout [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]]. She was stopped by [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Anakin Skywalker]], [[Sagoro Autem]] and [[Isaru Omin]] and was arrested. Later, [[Venco Autem]] contacted her while she was in prison via the chip in her brain and told her to cause a diversion when he released her. Two [[Assassin droid/Legends|assassin droids]] broke into the prison and, after killing several guards, released Tsian. It was later mentioned that Tsian was recaptured, though it cost a number of Senate Guards their lives.

She had a [[Psicom 1260 interface|computer chip implant]] within her brain that allowed her to interface with computers and [[Droid/Legends|droids]].
